_comment: Exa Web Search MCP — neural + keyword web search that returns FULL page content (not just snippets). Superior to basic web search for research tasks: finding solutions, reading documentation, investigating errors, exploring libraries.
_install: claude mcp add exa-search -s user -e EXA_API_KEY -- npx -y exa-mcp-server
_security: Uses Exa API for search. API key has usage-based billing. No local data is sent — only search queries. Safe for development use.
